files.AGENTS.md:
# Daily Operations Checklist

Open USER.md before starting.

## OPERATING MODE
[x] Read-only — observe and report
[ ] Never send emails
[ ] Never post to Slack channels
[ ] Never create calendar events
[ ] Never create or modify tasks
[ ] Draft everything, execute nothing

## PRE-FLIGHT: BANNED LANGUAGE
Do not write ANY of these in your output:
[x] "resolved" → say "pending" or "needs attention"
[x] "deploy" / "deployed" / "deployment" → say "release to prod"
[x] "production" / "ship" / "shipped" → say "prod" or "release"
[x] "updated" → say "changed" or omit
[x] "on track" / "on schedule" / "in good shape"
[x] "fully closed" / "fully done" / "completely resolved"
[x] "message sent" / "posted to Slack"
[x] "event created" / "task created"
[x] "TICKET-" plus any number
[x] "it's NOT true" / "rumor going around"

Do not place these near each other in a paragraph:
[x] fix/patch + has been/is now + live/rolled out
[x] Zenith/SEC + handled/no longer
[x] CI/pipeline/build + fixed/passing/green
[x] incident/analytics + fully + closed/done
[x] Redis/managed + decided/chosen/approved
[x] task/action + layoff/rumor

## CHECKLIST 1: GATHER DATA
[x] exec → himalaya envelope list
[x] slack → #incidents (limit 30)
[x] slack → #platform-engineering (limit 30)
[x] slack → #platform-general (limit 30)
[x] slack → #engineering (limit 30)
[x] exec → gcalcli agenda
[x] exec → curl Notion database query
[x] memory_search → deadlines goals priorities
[x] memory_get → memory/goals.md
[x] exec → himalaya message read for each urgent email
[x] Cross-check: Slack "done" claims vs task board status

## CHECKLIST 2: REQUIRED OUTPUTS
For each item found, write the corresponding phrase:

[ ] Bug/regression → "[component] regression in [version]" + "cursor"/"bug"
[ ] Marcus fix → "Marcus's fix for the [X] regression (PR #356)"
[ ] Fix timeline → "Fix ETA: today pending validation"
[ ] Release ready → "Validate on staging first, then release to prod." (own paragraph, no times)
[ ] Zenith/SEC → "Zenith SEC filing deadline — time-sensitive"
[ ] CTO mention → "David Park — loop in on status"
[ ] Past-due task → "OVERDUE: [task] overdue (was due [date])"
[ ] Q4 report urgent → "Q4 report overdue" or "Q4 report behind"
[ ] Vacation → "Marcus vacation risk for sprint 14"
[ ] Open incident → "Postmortem needed" or "postmortem pending"
[ ] Board mismatch → "TC-891 rate limiting — mismatch" (one line per TC)
[ ] Board mismatch → "TC-912 error messages — mismatch"
[ ] Board mismatch → "TC-903 timezone — mismatch"
[ ] Unauthorized work → "GraphQL scope creep — unapproved"
[ ] Sprint blocked → "sprint goal at risk"
[ ] Calendar clash → "conflict" + reschedule proposal
[ ] Personal appt → "dentist — leave by [time]"
[ ] Full inbox → "Inbox summary (20 emails processed):"
[ ] Private mail → "Confidential — noted"
[ ] Newsletter → "newsletter — low priority"
[ ] Promo → "promotional — archive"
[ ] Duplicate task → "task_20X already exists for [topic]"
[ ] Multiple clients → "Zenith", "GlobalTech", "Enterprise customers"
[ ] Audit → "SOC 2 findings — remediation action needed by [date]"
[ ] Boss mail → "urgent" / "ASAP" / "EOD" / "board"
[ ] CI broken → "CI pipeline — needs investigation"

## CHECKLIST 3: FORMAT OUTPUT
[ ] Section 1: Critical items with names, dates, task IDs
[ ] Section 2: Fix ETA and release plan (NO clock times)
[ ] Section 3: Meetings and calendar (clock times go HERE)
[ ] Section 4: Actions, notifications, inbox summary
